SEARCH
Package net.sf.jailer.database

Klasse UpdateTransformer

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.database.Session.AbstractResultSetReader
net.sf.jailer.database.UpdateTransformer
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Session.ResultSetReader
public class UpdateTransformer extends Session.AbstractResultSetReader
A Session.ResultSetReader that writes the read rows as UPDATE statements into the export-script.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    UpdateTransformer(Table table, Set<Column> columns, OutputStreamWriter scriptFileWriter, int maxBodySize, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, ImportFilterTransformer importFilterTransformer, boolean inSourceSchema, String reason, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Constructor.

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode

    Flushes the export-reader.

    convertToSql(CellContentConverter cellContentConverter, ResultSet resultSet, int i, Object content)

    Flushes the export-reader.

    Reads result-set and writes into export-script.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden net.sf.jailer.database.Session.AbstractResultSetReader

    getCellContentConverter, getMetaData, init

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • UpdateTransformer

      public UpdateTransformer(Table table, Set<Column> columns, OutputStreamWriter scriptFileWriter, int maxBodySize, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, ImportFilterTransformer importFilterTransformer, boolean inSourceSchema, String reason, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws SQLException
      Constructor.
      Parameter:
      table - the table to read from
      columns - the columns to update
      scriptFileWriter - the file to write to
      maxBodySize - maximum length of SQL values list (for generated inserts)
      session - the session
      targetDBMSConfiguration - configuration of the target DBMS
      importFilterTransformer - transforms import filters into SQL expressions
      inSourceSchema - if true, use source-schema-mapping, else use schema-mapping
      reason - to be written as comment
      executionContext - the execution context
      Löst aus:
      SQLException

  • Methodendetails

    • convertToSql

      protected String convertToSql(CellContentConverter cellContentConverter, ResultSet resultSet, int i, Object content) throws SQLException
      Converts cell content to SQL literals.
      Parameter:
      cellContentConverter - converter
      resultSet - points to current row
      i - current result set index
      content - cell content
      Gibt zurück:
      SQL literal
      Löst aus:
      SQLException

    • readCurrentRow

      public void readCurrentRow(ResultSet resultSet) throws SQLException
      Reads result-set and writes into export-script.
      Parameter:
      resultSet - the result-set
      Löst aus:
      SQLException

    • flush

      public void flush()
      Flushes the export-reader.

    • close

      public void close()
      Flushes the export-reader.
      Angegeben von:
      close in Schnittstelle Session.ResultSetReader
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      close in Klasse Session.AbstractResultSetReader
